Package neqsim.process.equipment.pipeline.twophasepipe.reporting

Class TwoFluidPipeReport

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.equipment.pipeline.twophasepipe.reporting.TwoFluidPipeReport
public final class TwoFluidPipeReport extends Object
Reporting helpers for TwoFluidPipe profiles, summaries, and benchmark comparisons.

    TwoFluidPipeReport.ProfileSnapshot
    Immutable snapshot of the profile arrays at one simulation time.
